character.definition: a fountain or spring out from the underground
(non-classical form of 溦) light rain; drizzle
disease of the throat, something stuck in the throat, to be stung, emaciated; illness of losing flesh
shake and wave of the grass
to jump; to leap; to bounce; (same as 䞵) to spring
to rise high; to stand erect
name of a place in Guangdong
short; incomplete; deficient; (same as 剁) to chop; to mince; to hash
